title: auth — published events
description: Every auth-lifecycle event fires after DB commit so downstream listeners never see uncommitted state. Payloads are readonly value objects. Payloads carry `user_id` / `identity_id` / `token_id` only — downstream services that need email / roles / permissions re-fetch through IdentityRepository or UserRepository so redaction rules apply consistently. High-severity events (RefreshTokenReuseDetected, JwtRevoked, ImpersonationStarted) fire on `notifications-critical` so ops paging pipelines catch them.

events.name: UserLoggedIn
events.trigger: Successful password + optional MFA verification → Sanctum PAT issued. Fires exactly once per interactive login (never on refresh, never on cross-app grant exchange).

payload.device_fingerprint: string (SHA-256; empty when detection is off)
payload.request_ip_hash: string (SHA-256 of IP; plaintext never emitted)

events.name: UserLoggedOut
events.trigger: POST /auth/logout OR platform equivalent. Sanctum PAT revoked + paired refresh token consumed in the same transaction.

events.name: SessionRevoked
events.trigger: A single PAT was revoked (via HasSessionRevocation trait, direct API call, or platform-admin action). Distinguished from UserLoggedOut because it does NOT require the user to be the actor.

events.name: AllSessionsRevoked
events.trigger: Bulk revocation — every active PAT for a User (or every User referencing an Identity in the cross-Application PasswordChanged case). Fires ONCE with the count; per-token SessionRevoked NOT fired for the bulk case.

payload.user_id: ULID | null (null when the bulk was cross-Application on an Identity)

events.name: RefreshTokenRotated
events.trigger: Refresh token exchanged for a new PAT + new refresh token. Old refresh consumed + new one issued inside the family_id chain.

events.name: RefreshTokenReuseDetected
events.trigger: An already-consumed refresh token was presented again — canonical BCP defense signal from RFC draft-ietf-oauth-security-topics. The reuse indicates an attacker has captured a token; every PAT + refresh token in the family is invalidated + every session for the User revoked as a breach response.

payload.presented_refresh_id: ULID (the already-consumed token that was replayed)

events.name: PasswordResetInitiated
events.trigger: POST /auth/password/forgot passed rate-limit + resolved a real Identity. NEVER fired when email is unknown (enumeration safety). This is the AUTH surface's version of identity::PasswordResetRequested — fires alongside identity's event, since auth OWNS the endpoint.

events.name: PasswordResetCompleted
events.trigger: PasswordReset token exchanged for a new password. Token consumed atomically + all sessions revoked in the same transaction.

events.name: EmailVerificationRequested
events.trigger: New EmailVerification token issued (registration OR email-change flow OR explicit resend). Debounced 60s per identity_id.

events.name: EmailVerificationCompleted
events.trigger: EmailVerification token exchanged for identity.email_verified_at = now(). Token consumed atomically. Fires alongside identity::IdentityEmailVerified — auth OWNS the endpoint, identity OWNS the substrate mutation.

events.name: CrossAppGrantIssued
events.trigger: POST /auth/cross-app/grant succeeded — short-lived (300s) grant token issued to the caller for exchange on the target Application.

events.name: CrossAppGrantExchanged
events.trigger: POST /auth/cross-app/exchange consumed a valid grant → target-Application PAT issued. Grant marked consumed atomically.

payload.target_user_id: ULID (the User row resolved on the target Application)

events.name: CrossAppGrantExpired
events.trigger: Grant was NOT exchanged before expires_at. Fired by PurgeExpiredCrossAppGrantsJob when it hard-deletes an unconsumed row.

events.name: MfaChallengeIssued
events.trigger: Login flow detected MFA is enrolled → dispatched MFA challenge (returns 202 with challenge_id). The pending-login context (application_id, tenant_id, requested_scope) is snapshotted into the challenge row's metadata.

events.name: MfaChallengeCompleted
events.trigger: MFA challenge verified successfully. Challenge consumed atomically → Sanctum PAT issued.

events.name: MfaChallengeFailed
events.trigger: MFA verification failed — wrong code / expired / already consumed. Third failure hard-deletes the challenge; the login flow restarts from step 1.

events.name: ImpersonationStarted
events.trigger: Platform staff invoked POST /platform/auth/impersonate/start with valid target + reason. `platform.impersonate` entitlement checked; delegation session recorded in `access/delegation` (Wave 1b module).

payload.target_user_id: ULID (`usr_...` — the tenant User being impersonated)

events.name: ImpersonationEnded
events.trigger: POST /platform/auth/impersonate/end OR TTL expiry OR explicit revocation. Impersonation PAT revoked.

events.name: JwtSigningKeyRotated
events.trigger: New JwtSigningKey row inserted with is_active=true; previous key marked retired_at=now() (kept for verification during rotation window).

events.name: JwtRevoked
events.trigger: Specific `jti` added to the deny list — revoke a JWT immediately, before natural expiry. Used on password-change, user-suspend, breach response.

events.name: LoginFromNewDeviceDetected
events.trigger: DeviceFingerprinter reported the login's device fingerprint has not been seen for this User in the last `auth.session.new_device_lookback_days` (default 30).
